task_completion.description: Garmin BaseCamp is open and the 'Fells Loop' track is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Garmin BaseCamp application window with 'Fells Loop' listed in the data pane (usually lower-left) or visible on the map.

task_completion.description: A route is created from the track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a route icon (often depicted as connected points or squares) appearing in the data pane, or a dialog box indicating track-to-route conversion.

task_completion.description: The newly created route is named 'Fells Survey Route'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Fells Survey Route' next to the route icon in the data pane, or in a route properties window.

task_completion.description: The export dialog is opened and navigated to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog box with the address bar showing 'Documents' or 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: The route is exported as a GPX file with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the file name 'fells_survey_export.gpx' entered in the 'File name' field of the export dialog, with the 'Save as type' set to GPX format, or the file visible in a File Explorer window in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to convert the track to a route.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with BaseCamp context menus (e.g., right-clicking the track and selecting 'Create Route from Track') rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to export the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the BaseCamp 'File -> Export' menu or export dialog being used, rather than a script or command line tool.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Garmin BaseCamp application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the Garmin BaseCamp interface is visible and actively used, not just a text editor creating a dummy GPX file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected route name is 'Fells Survey Route'. The expected export path is 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fells_survey_export.gpx'. The exported route must be derived from the 'Fells Loop' track.
